heading: Change in name of Theodore Roosevelt National Memorial Park
label: 241g Change in name of Theodore Roosevelt National Memorial Park
text: The area formerly known as the “Theodore Roosevelt National Memorial Park”, established by the Act of () [ et seq.], shall henceforth be known as the “Theodore Roosevelt National Park”.April 25, 194761 Stat. 5216 U.S.C. 241
